description: Composition White sleeveless tshirt made of 100% polyester, has a round neckline, iconic three stripes on the sides in blue fabric strips, mesh panels on the sides and back, and embroidered brand name on the upper left chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water below 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Look cool while working out in this white sleeveless vest from adidas. The iconic three stripes on the sides and the embroidered logo on the upper left chest increases the brand appeal, while the fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team it with tracks and performance shoes for sporting activities Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulder 18& rdquo
